dj_text: From Ingen Diskussion (feat. Johnson, L.O.C.) [Remix] to Amore Infelice. The genre hop here is reckless and I'm here for it.
commercial_text: Fun fact: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio costs nothing to run and even less to listen to.
hijack_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension.
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
title: Amore Infelice
